column20:
Jacana Resort is a peaceful and comfortable resort in Suriname, created for both relaxing vacations and business stays. Surrounded by nature, it offers a calm place to rest, recharge, and enjoy quality time with family, friends, or colleagues.
The resort has different types of rooms and suites, including options with jacuzzis and space for larger groups. Whether you're here for a weekend away, a work trip, or a special event, Jacana makes sure every guest feels welcome and well taken care of.
Wellness services like massages, sauna, nail care, and a gym are also available (re-opening soon), making it easy to take care of yourself during your stay.
At Jacana, we focus on friendly service, clean and comfortable spaces, and creating moments that guests want to come back for. We’re proud to be part of Suriname’s growing tourism and hospitality industry.

column20:
Interfarm N.V. brings decades of experience in supplying provisions to both the hospitality and maritime industries, in partnership with trusted local and international suppliers.
Our comprehensive product range includes fresh produce, dry goods, meats, seafood, dairy, beverages, non-food items, hospitality supplies, workwear, and cleaning products.
We offer a true “one-stop-shop” ship - chandling solution, complemented by value-added services such as technical support, ensuring reliability, efficiency, and quality in every aspect of our operations.

column20:
Torarica Group is Suriname’s leading hospitality destination, offering cruise visitors a seamless blend of comfort, culture, and experience—all within minutes of Paramaribo’s historic city center (UNESCO World Heritage Site). With three distinct properties—Torarica Resort, Royal Torarica, and Eco Torarica—guests can enjoy riverside relaxation, diverse culinary experiences, and vibrant local atmosphere in one location.

Cruise guests can indulge in curated day experiences, including pool & wellness access, signature dining across multiple restaurants, sunset cocktails by the Suriname River, and active options such as padel. The Group’s multi-outlet concept allows visitors to experience several venues in a single visit, making it ideal for short stays.

With high service standards, secure facilities, and a strong reputation, Torarica Group offers a premium, all-in-one gateway to experience Suriname efficiently and comfortably.
column21:

column20:
Escape the City or combine a City Tour – Discover Relaxation at Houttuyn Wellness River Resort

During your day in Paramaribo, take a short journey to experience a completely different side of Suriname. At Houttuyn Wellness River Resort, you’ll find a peaceful retreat surrounded by lush tropical greenery and the calming waters of the Suriname River.

Step away from the busy city and unwind in nature. Lounge by the pool, enjoy a refreshing drink, or indulge in a relaxing wellness treatment designed to help you fully recharge during your visit. Our serene setting offers the perfect opportunity to experience the natural beauty and tranquility that Suriname is known for.

Whether you are looking for a moment of relaxation, a beautiful place to enjoy lunch, or a revitalizing wellness experience during your cruise stop, Houttuyn provides an escape just outside Paramaribo.

Breathe in the fresh river air, relax in green surroundings, and make the most of your day in Suriname.

column20: The Dr. Jules Sedney Port of Paramaribo, managed by the Suriname Port Management Company, serves as the country’s premier maritime gateway, facilitating international trade and economic growth. Strategically located along the Suriname River, the port offers modern infrastructure to handle various cargo types, including containers, bulk and general cargo. With a strong commitment to efficiency, safety and sustainability, Suriname Port Management Company continues to develop port facilities to meet global standards, supporting the nation’s key industries. The Port of Paramaribo anchors a unique cluster of three extraordinary, off-the-beaten-path destination (the Guyanas), all within a single night sail of each other. Located just minutes from the UNESCO-listed city centre, the port offers modern infrastructure and warm hospitality for all visitors.

column20:
Yasmin Luxury Resort – Relaxed Luxury in Paramaribo

Yasmin Luxury Resort offers cruise visitors a peaceful and upscale escape just minutes from the city center. Designed around comfort, privacy, and personalized service, our boutique resort features spacious, fully equipped apartments, a tranquil pool area, and secure surroundings.

What sets us apart is our “relaxed luxury” concept—combining high-end amenities with a warm, welcoming atmosphere. Guests can enjoy flexible check-in, reliable shuttle service, and tailored assistance to make the most of their short stay in Suriname.

Ideal for couples, families, and small groups seeking quality and convenience, Yasmin Luxury Resort provides a calm retreat after a day of exploring Paramaribo.

Experience comfort. Enjoy privacy. Discover relaxed luxuxy

column20: Foundation SuReSur is an NGO founded in 2015 to promote awareness of waste separation by placing recycling bins for plastic bottles, plastic bags, aluminum beverage cans, and glass bottles and jars. We also do this through training at companies and government personnel, and through education in schools. Foundation SuReSur also regularly organizes clean-ups and the annual World Clean Up Day, where we work together with volunteers from the business community and other organizations to keep Suriname clean. Therefore, visitors coming to Suriname must ensure they do not create litter.
column63: We are working on establishing a Packaging Waste Fund through a legal basis for EPR (Extended Producer Responsibility), so that producers and importers will be legally obliged to contribute for their share of packaging that they place on the market.

column20:
Orange Suriname offers tailor-made shore experiences designed specifically for cruise visitors who want to discover the real Suriname in a limited amount of time. Based in Paramaribo, our local team knows exactly how to combine the country’s cultural highlights, nature, and authentic flavors into well-organized, time-efficient tours that fit perfectly within cruise schedules.
What makes Orange Suriname distinctive is our personal approach, small group experiences, and deep local knowledge. We go beyond standard sightseeing by connecting guests with Suriname’s vibrant cultures, historic architecture, tropical nature, and local cuisine.
Orange Suriname has already successfully handled excursions for cruise ships, organizing a wide variety of experiences — from specialized bird-watching tours to visits to authentic Maroon villages deep in the interior.
With reliable logistics, professional guides, and a strong focus on hospitality, Orange Suriname ensures that cruise guests return to their ship on time and with unforgettable memories of Suriname.
column21:
1. Professional English-speaking guides – Our experienced local guides communicate clearly in English and provide engaging insights into Suriname’s culture, history, and nature.
2. Short, cruise-friendly day tours – Our excursions are specifically designed for cruise passengers with limited time, ensuring well-planned tours that comfortably fit within ship schedules.
3. Nature experiences close to the cruise terminal – Guests can quickly reach beautiful natural areas near Paramaribo, offering opportunities to experience tropical wildlife, rivers, and birdlife without long travel times.
4. Authentic local experiences – We focus on genuine Surinamese culture, from local cuisine and historic architecture to encounters with traditional communities.
5. Reliable logistics and small groups – Our organized transport, professional coordination, and small-group approach ensure a smooth, comfortable, and personal experience for cruise visitors.
